title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Dabur India Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Dabur India Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Dabur India Consulting Pvt Ltd are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Kochi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Dabur India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Dabur India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dabur India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
